---
title: "Montaque Reynolds"
page-layout: article
toc: false
sidebar: portfolio
---

```{=html}
<div class="profile-header">
  <img src="https://schf-org.github.io/schf/people/reynolds-monty/avatar.jpg"
       alt="Montaque Reynolds" class="profile-avatar">
  <div class="profile-meta">
    <h1>Montaque Reynolds</h1>
    <p class="profile-title">Visiting Assistant Professor, Philosophy<br>
    Stetson University</p>
    <div class="profile-links">
      <a href="mailto:montaque.reynolds@gmail.com">Email</a>
      <a href="portfolio/resume-cv.qmd">CV</a>
      <a href="portfolio/index.qmd">Teaching Portfolio</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

Montaque Reynolds is a visiting assistant professor of philosophy at Stetson University. As a philosopher and educator, he is deeply passionate about leveraging artificial intelligence and interactive storytelling to enhance human reasoning, ethical decision-making, and overall flourishing — particularly for underserved youth.

In 2024, he obtained a PhD in Philosophy from Saint Louis University. Now, with a small team, he develops interactive philosophical thought simulations using massively multiplayer online game platforms, fostering critical thinking, moral imagination, and empathy.

## Current Courses

- [Logic, Spring 2026](../courses/logic/syllabus.qmd)
- [Introduction to Philosophy — TTH](../courses/intro/sections/tth.qmd)
- [Introduction to Philosophy — MW](../courses/intro/sections/mw.qmd)
- [Philosophy of Law](../courses/law/syllabus.qmd)
- [Philosophy of Mind](../courses/phil-mind/syllabus.qmd)

## Teaching Portfolio

For a full overview of teaching philosophy, course designs, and materials, see the [Teaching Portfolio](../portfolio/index.qmd).
